name: auto-master-erp
description: ERP Auto Master Colón — MVP (Fase 0 + Fase 1). Apps independientes: apps/api (NestJS) y apps/web (Next.js).

scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/api run build && npm --prefix apps/web run build
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/api run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix apps/api run typecheck && npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck
